message:
perf: upgrade frankensqlite to v0.1.1 (897c7364) for 100x write perf

Switch from frankensqlite f955253 (Mar 14) to 897c7364 (Mar 18),
picking up 130 commits of performance improvements including cached
VDBE engine reuse, Hekaton-style lock-free page locks, Arc<str>
migration, batch EOF page allocation, and zero-cost observability.

Measured 550x speedup on sync --flush-only with large WAL files
(55s → 0.1s), fixing the "pathologically slow writes" reported by
agents working in multi-agent environments.

Also bumps version to 0.1.29 and switches [patch.crates-io] to
relative sibling paths (../frankensqlite) for portable cross-host builds.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
